description:
Details

VERSATILE PILLOW COVERS FOR YOU: Suitable for placing on sofa, chair, couch, bed, car, window seat, love seat, living room, bedroom, bench, chaise, office, cafe and etc.

● EASIEST WAY TO UPDATE YOUR HOME: Rustic pillow covers with premium designed textured linen edges.

● EXQUISITE CRAFT MAKE YOUR ROOM DIFFERENT: Combined classic woven texture with the handmade burlap trim make pillow covers more idyllic and high-end.

● TOP FABRIC MAKE DURABLE PILLOW COVERS: Made of high quality linen-like fabric with woven texture, durable, wear resistant and stain resistant.

Machine washable components

Specifications:

Size: 20X20 inches

Color Scheme: Gray

Piece Count: 2 pieces

 

Please Note:

- Due to different screen display, the colors of the actual item may vary slightly from the above images.

- We are not shipping to Alaska/Hawaii, PR and VI and US Protectorates, APO/FPO.
